title: Verify password history prevents password reuse
description: Test that a user cannot reset their password to one of the last 5 previously used passwords.
preconditions: The user has a known password (e.g., 'OldPass123!')

steps.description: 1. Log in and initiate the password change/reset process
3. Initiate the password reset process again
4. Attempt to set the new password back to 'OldPass123!'

expected_result: The system rejects the password change, displaying an error message indicating that the password has been used recently and cannot be reused.
